hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.ts$' && echo "$filepath" | grep -q 'apps/backend'; then cd apps/backend && npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env(\.local|\.production|\.dev)?$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use Infisical for secrets, not direct .env edits' >&2; exit 1; fi
